string 2: We can go across from here. Remember that pink flower!
Okay. Ready? Now, jump with all your might!
Huh... I knew it.

This forest is meant to be confusing. It helps to defend
the village from enemies.
To tell you the truth...
...I ended up getting lost, myself! I don't know the way back!

Do you think you could help me find the way back to the
village...?

Well, well. Palmon, the dunderhead! I thought you were on
patrol duty?
These people just helped me with a Titan attack!
We have to warn the village about the Titans!

Hey, wait a moment. Can you prove that you are not a
bunch of Titans yourselves?
We've received word that the Titans are nearly on our doorstep.

Lord Bacchusmon made it very clear we shouldn't let
anyone through!
This is to help bring peace to the forest!
We set a few traps so no one can get to the village easily.
Oh, no! My ivy is tangled around the tree.
I can't use my vines with it like that. I've got to do something.
You did it! We can go across now!

We can keep going despite Hawkmon and Floramon's 
interference!
Oh, hello! Do you want to ride Locomon?
Yes, please!
{end}Not right now.
Oh. Not getting on? All right...

Hurry to the Guardian Palace! They say the Titans are
storming Junomon's temple in numbers!
What are you doing here? Wait. That face...
Have we met before? You do not look like a Titan, I must say...

I do not mind you joining us. But let me warn you. We are
quite tough. I wonder if you can keep up...

I'm HerculesKabuterimon, one who stands for the peace of
this forest!
A troop of fearsome Titans are heading for this forest as we speak.

If you're joining our forces, you have our welcome. Otherwise...
turn around and leave!

The Titans are so strong... They turned this forest into a
horrible place. I can barely stand to look at it...

The village wasn't doing enough, so we've gathered together
to change that.

But it seems the village is actually trying to improve.
That's good to know.

Hey! You're in the presence of Lady Lotosmon! How impudent! 
Back off!
Phew, I finally got away... I'm exhausted...

Those Digimon up ahead probably ain't such bad guys, but
they sure are scary...

Are there not any more worthy adversaries around? I am
getting tired of the ones here.

I suppose it is time to go elsewhere and find someone
stronger... and more interesting.

Well! Welcome to our hideout. Thank you for what you did for
the village.
If it were not for you, all of us would have been in danger.
We shall keep trying to fix this forest in our own way...

...but perhaps we can start working with the village from
now on as well—working to trounce the Titans, of course!
Okey-dokey! I'll help!

Card battles help you gain the experience and wisdom
necessary for combat. How about a match?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Experience and wisdom will surely be useful in the coming
battles. Call on me again if you change your mind!
You thoroughly defeated me! I see you're quite clever.
Looks like I win. But you did have some great moves.

The Guardian Palace's barrier shouldn't have broken so easily...
Maybe it was 'cause the power of the Current was disturbed.

Was targeting the Current in different places all part of their plan...?
I heard they're after the treasure in Lady Junomon's care.

It's called "the Relic of Iliad." I heard it's an artifact
from a hero of lore.

In any case, this is urgent. I'll send Locomon over 
immediately! Are you ready to board?

The boss said not to let anyone who doesn't have
any money ride, so no way!

Thank you very much, glurp!
This place has gotten pretty dangerous nowadays, glurp.
Thanks for saving me!
*sniff* That was so scary...!

You saved my life, glurp!
But I never expected Lotosmon to show up, glurp!
Wow, Lotosmon! Quite the shock! But thank you!
Thank you... for saving me. But Lotosmon is... kind of scary...
Yay! A first-time guest!

Don't worry. Just leave everything to the Palmon Ride
Company! Your first time is free! Ready for a ride?!

Looks like they're getting attacked by some Titans...
We've gotta go help!

It's you! I knew it! Do you remember me? I used to be
Hawkmon. Thanks for saving me, man!
I've got bad news! The Titans are attacking the village!
It's real bad out there! Will you come to the village with me?

That's the long way around! It's much quicker to go from
the east!

It's the same thing all over again... Wait. Something's different.
Those little Digimon seem less tired this time around.

Maybe we've traveled back in time a bit?
At any rate, we've got to help them!
I knew it was you! The last time I saw you, I was still Floramon!
Have you come to join the festival?

The Titans are at the village, you say?! Oh, dear.
Understood. Let us go right away!
Understood. Let us go right away!

I was just patrolling the area. Let's patrol the west side
while we head toward the village!

That's the long way around! We have to head to the village
from the west!

Avoiding tragedy for Bacchusmon comes first.
Let's hurry on.

Well, well! Palmon, the dunderhead!
You made it all the way here!
None of you are to be trusted! I'm not letting you go any further!
Not to worry, however, for this is THAT place!
That's right! Because Woodmon's here!
Can you people even see Woodmon? Anyway, goodbye!
Well, well. You made it here! Let me congratulate you!
But we will not let you get any closer to the village!
Time for my babies to shine! Get them!
Flora, over there! Something is happening!
I-Is that... No way... Titans?!
O-Okay... I'm leaving them to you people!
They ran away! How pathetic.
D-Do you think we really stand a chance here...?!

They may not look like it, but they're friends! Please, you've 
got to help them!
It is just as Palmon says! You truly are good, kind people...
Thank you for saving us.
I'm sorry that I ever doubted you.
But I have to say...
...you people really are amazingly strong! And you're so cool!
...We... we wanna be your underlings!
Yes! Exactly! We are both your underlings now!
And if we ever get in trouble, we will rely on you to save us!
That's right! You're obligated to protect your underlings!
We'll go ahead and tell the village about you!
I bet they could talk their way out of anything.
But now we can go to the village.

We have to go warn everyone that the Titans are coming!
Let's hurry to the village!

Rosemon started a business near here.
You should go visit when you get the chance.
We need to hurry for the village!
Welcome! Sorry, but I'm busy right now.
Can you come back another time?
Well, what a lovely surprise! Welcome!

Thank you for saving the village.
I had no idea such horrible things were happening.
But, thanks to you, now I can focus on my business.

And your continued support will be much appreciated,
and will help the forest, too!
Welcome! Thank you for choosing us!
Ah, I see you have some cards, too. How about a match with me?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

I see. Well, I guess it can't be helped... But please do
stop by again sometime.

I thought I might have a slight chance, but you were too
good for me.

Did I really win? Hee hee! It's pretty fun having card
battles with others.
Aaagh...!
Ungh... *hiccup*

We're going into high alert mode. You folks go give
Junomon this message...

Tell Junomon that the World Tree has been attacked,
and all-out war is now inevitable.
When you get back, I'll pour you a drink.

I never imagined the Current's flow could ever be changed...
We must deal with this before it's too late.

Go and tell Junomon about this immediately.
I have a bad feeling.
You people! Thank you for saving us earlier!

Shurimon gave me a sound scolding... but Shurimon is a good
person who really cares, too...
Anyway, we're your underlings now!

And that means you have to protect us! So there's nothing
to worry about anymore!
Well, I'll be looking forward to all your kind protection!
Ah, it is you! Very good timing!
We are about to play a thriller of a game with Puppetmon!
You should join in with us—your underlings!

Beyond this point is the sanctuary where the World Tree
grows. Don't forget that this is a sacred place.

How could they have infiltrated without us realizing?
I suppose peace made us complacent...

Such a blunder! ...But it's time now to focus. Exactly
where did they make their incursion?
Such mastery. Who are you? I am MegaKabuterimon.

You seem to be a seasoned fighter, but do be careful in
this area.

I received word that my former friend is now Okuwamon and
is running amok.

A tactician, Okuwamon, will lead a troop to attack you. If
you strike the vanguard, however, they will disperse.

If you cross swords with Okuwamon, be sure to strike first
and you may have a chance of victory.

You defeated Okuwamon! I cannot believe they made it all the
way to the sanctuary.

They used to be my friend, but that is all right. This is the
fate of those who go astray.

However, this will not be the last of this Digimon, I fear.
Something is going on... Be on your guard.

Lord Bacchusmon is always drunk.
What kind of behavior is that for a chief? Sheesh.

It's been a long time since I've seen that kind of drive
in Lord Bacchusmon. It's good to see the chief sober.

But the situation is dire. We need to restore the
Current at all costs!

That flying thing earlier... I bet it's going to be real
trouble! I didn't get a good look, but it was BIG!
I know, right? It looked really dangerous! I wonder what it was...
Anyway... Don't you think Stingmon over there is dreamy?
What? I think that new kid, Leomon, is much better looking.
FunBee Squad, sitrep!
FunBee A, reporting! Titans were spotted in the lower levels!

FunBee B, reporting! A giant airborne being was sighted in
the outer forest!

FunBee C, reporting! Palmon has grouped up with some
strange Digimon!

FunBee D, reporting! I found some succulent nectar deep
in the forest!
Master CannonBeemon, what are your orders?

We head deep into the forest for that nectar. All units, prepare
to sortie!
Roger! Preparing to sortie!

Are you travelers? Wonderful to see you here. *yawn* I'm so
sleepy...

Hmm? Where is Bacchusmon? At the other side of that square
over there. *yawn*

It's nice and quiet here, and the booze is great. It's a
paradise. *yawn* So tired...

What's this? You're the humans who were in Central Town,
aren't you!
Thanks to you, I decided to go off on this journey.

This village is different from Central Town, somehow. It's
livelier.

The chief is apparently a drinker, but I guess that's just
the way it is here.
So the Titans are planning to attack this place...
It's such a nice village. I wish I could help them somehow.

Tch. Everyone is way too merry. The Titans could attack at
any time.

Bacchusmon shouldn't be escaping reality with the bottle.
What kind of chief does that?

Wait a tick... Who are you? And what's with the noisy blue thing
behind you? If he's with you then scram, and take him with you.

I can't believe the Titans were allowed to defile the
sanctuary! Pathetic!
I can't rely on the others. I must Digivolve and get stronger...!

You! You were in Central Town! ...Hey, don't you think that
Digimon over there is so cool?

He never talks to me, but it'd be so awesome to go on an
adventure together!
Yo! What're we all doing today?
I'm down for anything. Suggest something!
A vine-swinging race!
Collecting Digimon bugs!
Drinking booze with really hot sauce in it!
I love it! Let's do it all! Start at the top of the list!

Wait a sec! Make sure Shurimon doesn't catch us. I don't
want another earful.

I know we just got here, but we have to warn everyone about
the Titans!

I'll make sure everyone around here hears. Could you go and
tell Bacchusmon about it?

I heard the sanctuary was in some kind of trouble... I hope
it's okay.

Ivy swinging is about all I have to offer, but let me know
if there's anything I can do to help!

I cannot believe you lot. How many times have I told you
it is dangerous outside?!
W-We are very sorry...
Ugh. Someone blabbed on us.
What did you say?! If you are not sorry...
No, I AM sorry! I regret everything. Please forgive me!
Flora! Wait!
Hey! I am not done talking to you!
Hmph! ...Oh, well. I am just glad no one was hurt...
Are you the folks those kids mentioned?

I apologize for any trouble those good-for-nothings may
have caused you.

I found those kids in a weakened state in the outskirts of
the village, and took them in.

Those two cause me particular grief... I hear they were
just attacked by Titans...

I am truly grateful to you for saving them and getting rid
of those Titans. Thank you.

This area is much too big. I was wandering around in
circles until I finally found this place.
You can say that again! This ain't a very tourist-friendly location.

It is certainly much more complicated than Central Town. Allow me
to take a short break before we have a look around.
Boy, there's so much to do. Hey, how's everything going with you?
Uh, everythin' is...
...goin'... oka...

...They are still breathing. What could have put them to sleep?
It was far too sudden for everyone to pass out drunk all at once...
Hm? We have met before, have we not?
Ngh... I am feeling... kind of... sleepy...

There! It happened again all of a sudden...
I wonder what is going on...!

There are some that are still fast asleep.
I shall keep my eye on them.

You go on and head for the sanctuary without me.
I am counting on you!
It's sleeping.

Hey, why don't you join me over here and have some fun!
Don't be shy!

It seems Bacchusmon is in a good mood. He probably
wouldn't let you get away very easily.
[Join Bacchusmon.]{next}
{end}[Continue enjoying the party.]

Whew! It finally seems to be winding down.
...How have you all been lately?

I have plenty of work to do... You always keep me busy with
all kinds of issues, Lotos.
Hohoho. What a difficult position you are in.

I've started my own company. It keeps getting busier with
more and more customers and employees!

They seem to be having a private conversation. Let's leave
them alone.
Hello?! Is anyone here?! Say something if you can hear me!
Urk! What is going on?!
You should look for Bacchusmon and Sirenmon.
I will keep looking around this area. You should try the sanctuary.

Those kids have grown up and gotten so strong before I even
realized it. How moving.

We continued on down separate paths, but thankfully our
hearts are still united...
No need to worry anymore. I am truly happy.
The feast was amazing. It is a good thing that we moved here.

You're right about that! This place is so relaxing, and the
booze is good.

But I kinda miss Central Town sometimes, too. I wonder how
it's doing right about now...

Man, what an awesome party! All three of 'em have really
grown!

We should all get together again like we used to! I'll
think of something fun to do!
What does Stingmon mean, "that noisy one"?! After all I've done!
Speaking of which... I wonder how Lilamon is doing now...

Haven't heard a peep since she went after Stingmon... But,
knowing Lilamon, I'm sure she's doing fine!

Master Garudamon told me to follow the path I was meant 
to follow.
To be honest, I am still not sure what path that is...

But I will fulfill my duties with honor, so that I can be
proud of myself when we meet again one day.
They seem to be sleeping.
I must thank you. You saved the village.
We could not have done it without you, to be sure...
*sigh* But there is still so much to do...

Lotos and the others are supposedly going to help, but I am
still worried.

Lotos is apparently at the station right now. You should go
visit if you are interested.
Let's investigate the village.
Enjoy the party for now.
...They just fell asleep, thankfully. But I wonder why so suddenly...
They are all sleeping... What in the world is going on?!
You... Are you the one who was in Central Town?

It has been a while! Good to see you. My appearance has changed
quite a bit as you can see, but I am doing well.
And, of course, Lillymon is being as noisy as ever. Hahaha.

Hmph! There are more worthy adversaries here than back in
Central Town. I will admit that.
But is this really all they have?! Come on. I want more!
This party was so much fun. We should do it again!

I never thought we'd get together like this again. What an
emotional reunion!
You have grown so much... I am so happy for all of you...!
Whooo! Look at my burning body! Look at all this flame!
Now, now, Meramon! Do not get too carried away!
You... Were you Aquilamon before? You've become quite impressive.
Master Garudamon! Please come back!
We need your guidance! Please, Master!

...I can't go back. You should follow the path you were
meant to follow.

What do you mean by that?! Please tell me, Master
Garudamon!

I've been doing this business for a long time now, so I've
got a pretty good eye for things.
I can usually tell what a person is like at a glance.

I won't pry into your affairs, but you seem to be carrying a
lot on your shoulders.

If you ever need anything, I'm willing to help. The only
thing I know about is business, though.
Tch. I usually don't talk this much. Must be the cheap booze...
Hey! Come be mesmerized by my captivating dance!
How wonderful... I am glad we moved here.
What's the meaning of this? I heard the village was in danger...

And what about you? Have you been training lately? 
Being overconfident will get you tripped up.
Look at these fools... This is ridiculous.
Damn it. Where are all the "fearsome" Titans?
I was ready to enjoy smashing them up. What a letdown.
The Current was running amok, but now it's starting to calm down.

Now that Sirenmon is interred in this land, perhaps she is
cleansing the ground.
I owe you one, also.

It's a little late to ask you this now, but what did you come
here for in the first place.

Ah... The fruit of Karpos Hulē, you say? That won't be
easy to find.
Maybe it'll appear when this forest has fully revived.

It will probably take some time, but... I'll let you know as
soon as I find some.
I owe it to you for saving the forest.
Let's have a card battle! I want to test some new strategies!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Aw, that's too bad. But I'm sure the opportunity will
come again soon.
My strategies didn't work... Looks like I need to rethink things.

I knew they were good strategies! I love it when
everything works out.

Are you perhaps looking for someone to have a card
battle with? I wouldn't mind being your opponent.
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Oh... It seems I was mistaken. Let's play sometime
when you're in the mood.

You're really good. I could learn a thing or two from your
techniques.

Thank goodness I managed to win somehow.
You were no easy opponent!

Want to have a card battle with me? I'm pretty sure I can
beat you!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
Darn! I really wanted to blow off some steam!
That can't be! Let me try again!
I win! I win! I'm the best!

Would you mind having a card battle with me? I'm a little
tired of singing.
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Not in the mood for cards, huh? I'll try asking someone
else, then.
I knew it wouldn't be easy. You're really good at card battles!

Yay, I won! I want to get really good at card battles, just
like my singing!
Hohoho! Nothing can beat my deck! Allow me to test it on you!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Hmph! Do you not want to witness my power?! ...I see. You
must be too afraid!
What?! I have... lost?! You must be some kind of expert.
Hohoho! Of course! No one can defeat me!

Perhaps they did not all fall asleep... but were instead
put to sleep...!

I can feel something like a heartbeat beneath my feet.
Maybe it won't be long before we meet again.

As you can see, I'm unable to leave the sanctuary. The band
would have to come to me.
You found me...
Darn. You found me...
*rustling*
I've been seen! Well there's only one thing to do, then!
Halt! I will not allow you to proceed any further!
Calm down, Cherrymon. They're with me.

Sirenmon? I see... I leave the sanctuary to you, then.
You may proceed into the forest.

So, you were with Sirenmon, were you? My vision was
obstructed by the fog... I thought you were the enemy...

You are certainly something else, though! I bet I could
trust you folks to protect the sanctuary...
Hmm. I don't see any way into the sanctuary. Where's the entrance?

Huh? The way we came in has been blocked off...! Unless
we got lost somehow...

Are you lost? Try investigating with "Analyze." You might
find out something.

My vision was obstructed by the fog... but I never imagined
it would be Sirenmon and her guests...

Considering your strength, though, I bet I could trust you
folks to protect the sanctuary...
Oh, it is you folks! Thank you for all you did for the sanctuary!

I never imagined the Titans would manage to not only infiltrate,
but even stop the flow of the Current!
I am utterly mortified. Perhaps it is time to retire...
Who goes there?!
The fog is clearin' up, and I hear strange voices.
Oh, thank goodness. Thought I was a goner.
*mumbling* Apples...
Ugh! How careless of me. I was about to fall asleep...
Who goes there?! None shall pass!
Ouch! *sigh* Have we met somewhere before...?

Let me see... Ah, I remember now! You're those kids from
a while back!

Perhaps you may be able to do something about this situation.
Bacchusmon is just ahead. Could you please talk to him?
I am getting tired... So sleepy...
I leave the sanctuary to you...! Argh! My aching back!
I am impressed by your strength. Now I can retire in peace.
